name: shop-mfe
description: 基于 Module Federation 的微前端电商应用

scripts.build: npm run build --prefix products && npm run build --prefix cart && npm run build --prefix auth && npm run build --prefix order && npm run build --prefix shell
scripts.start: concurrently -n server,shell,products,cart,auth,order -c "#92c5ff,#ff8f5e,#a5e3a5,#ffd479,#c9a0ff,#7fdfe5" "npm start --prefix server" "npm run preview --prefix shell" "npm run preview --prefix products" "npm run preview --prefix cart" "npm run preview --prefix auth" "npm run preview --prefix order"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,shell,products,cart,auth,order -c "#92c5ff,#ff8f5e,#a5e3a5,#ffd479,#c9a0ff,#7fdfe5" "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix shell" "npm run dev --prefix products" "npm run dev --prefix cart" "npm run dev --prefix auth" "npm run dev --prefix order"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix shell && npm install --prefix products && npm install --prefix cart && npm install --prefix auth && npm install --prefix order
